text:
Once upon a time, there was a small mouse. The mouse loved going outside and exploring the garden. One sunny day, it went exploring deeper into the woods.

Suddenly, a big, scary owl swooped down. The mouse froze in terror.

Then, the owl spoke. "Don't worry! I won't eat you. Just keep walking." Then it turned round owl eyes and winked.

The mouse looked cautiously around, surprised. It carefully made its way home that evening. It's wasn't just any owl—it was Santa Claus' owl! They'd met many times before.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
